title: Workday, Inc. (WDAY) Presents at Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference (Transcript)
text: Workday, Inc. (NASDAQ:WDAY ) Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference March 9, 2023 11:35 AM ET Company Participants Carl Eschenbach - Co-Chief Executive Officer Aneel Bhusri - Co-Chief Executive Officer Conference Call Participants Keith Weiss - Morgan Stanley Keith Weiss Thank you, everyone for sticking with us, all the way to day four of the Morgan Stanley TMT Conference. Really pleased to have with us this morning from Workday, both co-CEOs, both Aneel Bhusri and Carl Eschenbach.

title: Workday: Revenue Beat With Many Competitive Advantages
text: Workday is a leading Human capital management platform which has over 10,000 customers globally, including 25% of the Fortune 2000. The company reported strong financial results for the fourth quarter of FY23, as it beat both revenue and adjusted earnings growth estimates.
